heroSection.title: Accept payments instantly across Nigeria.
heroSection.description: Clap helps businesses and drivers receive money faster with instant transfers, QR payments, and seamless collections built for everyday commerce.

conversionSection.title: Built for ride payments, business collections, and everyday transfers.
conversionSection.description: Pay for rides, collect payments, and move money instantly with a faster and simpler payment experience.

WaitListFormSection.title: Join the waitlist
WaitListFormSection.description: Be among the first businesses, drivers, and early users to experience instant payments with Clap.

waitlist.title: You’re on the
waitlist.description: Thanks for joining the Clap waitlist. We’ll keep you updated as we prepare early access across Nigeria.

CookieBanner.label: Cookie consent
CookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse site usage.

Footer.title: Move money faster with Clap
Footer.description: Clap is building modern payment infrastructure for Nigeria — helping businesses, drivers, and everyday users send and receive money instantly.
Footer.built: Built for speed. Designed for trust.

disclaimer.paragraph1: Clap is a financial technology company, not a bank. Financial services are provided through licensed banking and payment partners in Nigeria.
disclaimer.paragraph2: Clap provides technology and infrastructure that enable users and businesses to send, receive, and manage digital payments securely and efficiently.
disclaimer.paragraph3: Payment processing, wallet services, settlements, and related financial services may be facilitated through regulated third-party financial institutions and payment providers.
disclaimer.paragraph4: Certain services may be subject to eligibility requirements, transaction limits, compliance checks, and regulatory approvals.
disclaimer.paragraph5: All trademarks, logos, and brand names are the property of their respective owners.
